name: Merkle Science
description: Predictive crypto risk and compliance platform with API for transaction monitoring and KYT.

seo.title: Merkle Science — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Merkle Science: Predictive crypto risk and compliance platform with API for transaction monitoring and KYT.

when_to_use: Predictive crypto risk scoring before transaction broadcast
KYT (Know Your Transaction) API for VASP compliance
Illicit fund tracing across multi-hop blockchain transactions
DeFi exposure risk scoring for institutional portfolios
Real-time exchange compliance screening for deposit flows

pros: Predictive risk model, not just blacklist lookups
KYT transaction monitoring plus API integration
cons: Smaller market share than TRM or Chainalysis
Predictive scoring harder to explain in audits
Chain coverage competitive but not leading
Enterprise sales process, no self-serve plan
review.verdict: Predictive crypto AML with a novel angle on risk; test explainability before betting audits on it.
review.best_for: Crypto exchanges and banks wanting behavioral KYT beyond static blacklist-driven screening
review.not_for: Compliance teams that need pure blacklist-match outputs with straightforward audit trails
